name: Sauerbratin Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Form the ground beef and chopped onions into meatballs.
2. Heat 2 tbsp butter in a skillet over low heat.
3. Brown the meatballs, adding 1 1/2 cups water.
4. Add 3 tbsp catsup, 1 1/2 tbsp brown sugar, 8 peppercorns (tied in a small bag), 1 bay leaf, 1/2 tsp salt, and 9 crumbled ginger snap cookies to the skillet.
5. Cover and cook on low heat for 1/2 to 3/4 hour.
6. Serve over mashed potatoes.
